title: KDNA Lab Case
description: A single test case for KDNA Lab experiments.

area.description: Experiment area this case belongs to.

target.description: Subject under test: domain name, CLI command, or SPEC section.

priority.description: P0 = blocking, P1 = high, P2 = medium, P3 = low.

input.description: The prompt or command sent to the agent/system under test.

expected_exit_code.description: Expected CLI exit code (only for CLI area cases).

must_include.description: Phrases that must appear in the output (case-insensitive).

must_not_include.description: Phrases that must not appear in the output (case-insensitive).

rubric.description: L2 scoring rubric: dimension name → max points.

conditions.description: Runtime conditions under which this case should be tested.

tags.description: Arbitrary tags for filtering and grouping.
